parameters.content:
## DD-3 Communication Logger
POST /webhook/communication-logger with JSON body: project_id (uuid, required), update_type (status_update | feasibility_sent | floor_plan_sent), message, subject, sent_by_email - optional with defaults.

Writes a communications row (sent_to_owner = false) plus an audit_logs row (action = communication_logged).

Tester mode: NO email nodes here. The dashboard API handles preview-only sending with test addresses (theopenhotels@gmail.com routed to akashsakhrani05@gmail.com).
Manual step: repoint Supabase credential dsZvYaB5av1RwbxL to https://fwzdhmobfcwsspobrvdl.supabase.co (service_role key).
